response.justification: Strong engineer with 20 years of proven experience building and shipping products across multiple domains, currently working on AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks, AI-agent tools at re:cinq). Exceeds minimum 15-year requirement and demonstrates hands-on cloud and AI technical expertise. However, limited evidence of strategic business impact, customer advisory experience, or established thought leadership in AI innovation—areas central to this Director-level role. The AI experience appears recent and infrastructure-focused rather than strategy/innovation-focused.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with proven ability to build and ship successful products (WatchUp Apple TV app top 10, GISCollective platform adopted by Green Map)
Currently working on cutting-edge AI infrastructure at re:cinq (MCP code generators, AI-agent frameworks), demonstrating hands-on expertise in contemporary AI platforms and systems
Strong technical leadership background with evidence of mentoring, community contribution, and knowledge sharing (open-source projects, workshops, conference talks at FOSS4G)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML—a preferred qualification for strategic AI leadership role focused on innovation and future product vision
Limited demonstrated experience advising enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge AI adoption and technology strategy—a core responsibility of this role
AI expertise appears recent (2025-present) and infrastructure-focused rather than demonstrating strategic AI product innovation or business differentiation leadership

key_factors.factor: Current hands-on AI infrastructure work at re:cinq
20+ years of proven execution and product shipping across multiple technical domains
No demonstrated strategic AI thought leadership or enterprise customer advisory experience
